routePreferences.reason: Use the purpose-built brief drafter when a task needs scope, non-goals, done-when, and verification.
Use the planning skill for implementation plans before execution.
Use systematic debugging before patching failures.
Use independent verification for verifier-owned acceptance passes.
Use task closeout for cleanup, residual risks, and durable next-step recording.
Use session hygiene when context is stale, interrupted, or contradictory.

notes: External skills are discovered and routed by Threadsmith v1, but not executed automatically.
Project-level route preferences are now committed in .threadsmith/skill-routing.json.
Control Deck UI visibility for discovery health and selected adapter status remains a follow-up slice.
